name: ChatGPT Pro
description: An AI assistant for writing, coding, brainstorming and productivity.
fullDescription: ChatGPT helps individuals and businesses write content, generate ideas, answer questions, build software, analyze documents and automate repetitive work with AI.

name: Notion
description: An all-in-one workspace for notes, projects and collaboration.
fullDescription: Notion combines notes, databases, project management, documentation and AI into one flexible workspace for individuals and teams.

name: Airbnb
description: Book unique homes and travel experiences around the world.
fullDescription: Airbnb allows travelers to discover apartments, villas and unique accommodations in thousands of cities worldwide.

name: Spotify
fullDescription: Spotify gives users access to millions of songs, podcasts and personalized playlists across multiple devices.

name: Coursera
description: Online learning platform with professional courses.
fullDescription: Coursera offers university and industry courses, certificates and professional programs taught by leading institutions.

name: Amazon
fullDescription: Amazon provides millions of products, customer reviews and fast delivery options across numerous categories.
